name: Bug report
about: Something is not working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `local-cli` with model `...`
2. Type `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error message if applicable.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- Local CLI Agent version: [run `/version` in the agent]
- Backend: [Ollama / LM Studio]
- Model: [e.g. qwen2.5-coder:7b]
